logger.doc:name: Request recieved to database implimentation flow
logger.message: ------------Request recieved to database implimentation flow-------Before DB--------------

snowflake:select.doc:name: retrive transaction data
snowflake:select.snowflake:sql: SELECT c.ACCOUNTNUMBER AS ACCOUNTNUMBER, t.value['transactionType']::STRING AS TRANSACTIONTYPE, t.value['amount']::NUMBER AS AMOUNT, t.value['balanceAfterTransaction']::NUMBER AS BALANCE, t.value['timestamp']::STRING AS TIMESTAMP FROM MYDATABASE.PUBLIC.BANK_CUSTOMER_DATA c, LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => c.TRANSACTIONS) t WHERE c.ACCOUNTNUMBER = :accountNumber;
